name: opendtp-studio
description: Open source browser-based desktop publishing studio with prompt-to-layout workflows.

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/dtp-core && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w packages/dtp-core && npm run test -w packages/dtp-core && npm run test -w apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/dtp-core && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
